metadata.description: Multi-agent development pipeline for Claude Code — 12 specialist agents, 13 slash commands, 18 skills, adversarial critic loop, and automated sync distribution. Drop-in plugin that adds /plan, /build, /review workflows with explorer, architect, builder, critic, tester, and reviewer agents.
